visualizerParams.title: Code Refactor: Bitwise Power of Two
visualizerParams.problemDescription: Refactor the power-of-two check to use a bitwise trick `(n & (n - 1)) === 0`. This is the most efficient way to check in most languages.

solution.explanation: A power of two in binary is always a 1 followed by zeros (e.g., 8 is 1000). Subtracting 1 flips all bits (7 is 0111). A bitwise AND between `n` and `n-1` will result in 0 only if `n` is a power of two.
